purpose: Multi-timeframe LevelAnalysisSnapshot real-cache validation after optional 15m inputSummary hardening.
limitations: No local real-cache 15m candle directories were present, so this run validates the absent-15m fallback path on real cache and leaves supplied-15m real-cache comparison blocked.
Committed artifacts are compact summaries, not raw candle data or full snapshots.
The selected symbols reuse previous real-cache validation symbols for continuity and are not an exhaustive pass across every cached group.
